quote: I'm not even the same person I was yesterday. That's what keeps me creative.
author: Kendrick Lamar

quote: I have so much discipline as far as repetition—I don't give a fuck if it's a thousand push-ups or pull-ups or whatever, but it's always that extra 5 percent I'm like, What am I on today? What's going to be the evolution for myself today?
author: Kendrick Lamar

quote: It's stuff that I've written that's just now seeing daylight, because I wasn't secure with myself in order to do it.
author: Kendrick Lamar

quote: It's not me pointing at my community; it's me pointing at myself.
author: Kendrick Lamar

quote: You can have the platinum album, but when you still feel like you haven't quite found your place in the world...
author: Kendrick Lamar

quote: It's not only caging us in the prisons, but up here as well.
author: Kendrick Lamar

quote: I always thought it was cool to be able to go in any room and put that shit in. There's no ceilings, no boundaries; it's free.
author: Anderson .Paak

quote: The joy and the pain — you just need both.
author: Anderson .Paak

quote: Sometimes you have to laugh in order not to cry.
author: Anderson .Paak

quote: What's the point in being here? To show the world who I am.
author: Bad Bunny

quote: I'll die and that's it — I'm not going to take anything with me.
author: Bad Bunny

quote: When you're far away, you appreciate things more and you understand them better.
author: Bad Bunny

quote: If I have the chance to say something, I will say it — but that doesn't obligate me to always say something.
author: Bad Bunny

quote: Never stop dreaming and being yourselves; never forget where you come from. There are many ways to serve your country; we chose music.
author: Bad Bunny

quote: Let people know that I'm not just a rapper, I'm a human being. Those are the things that make people grow. People that want to commit suicide, you might give them another chance.
author: Young Thug

quote: Anything in the world got style. A roach got style, the way he run, the way he hide, the way he eat. Everything has style, so I don't care to look for that.
author: Young Thug

quote: You can't learn how to keep inventing. You just keep learning how to keep learning. What's in you is in you.
author: Young Thug

quote: I'm trying to have something here that's like an experience that's passed on to generations.
author: Travis Scott

quote: Can't afford shit. And my mom's disabled. And still she looked after me. That's why I move the way I move. Nothing stopping me, bro.
author: Travis Scott

quote: Everybody go through shit. He still a dope musician.
author: Travis Scott

quote: People wanted to keep rap a certain way. I didn't.
author: Travis Scott

quote: I embraced what I thought people was gonna hate about me. I was gonna turn the hate into love.
author: Future

quote: I was born Nayvadius, but now I'm Future. Should I dwell on what Nayvadius was supposed to be?
author: Future

quote: Don't ask for a million dollars. Ask for the stuff that'll get you a million dollars — your health, your brain, your sanity, wisdom.
author: Future

quote: I want to keep doing what I'm doing and see how far I can go. See when it stops. See what the end is like.
author: Future

quote: I think I need to be a vessel of what not to do. In some things, I need to be a lesson on what to do.
author: Future

quote: More than any accolades, sales and everything, I just want people to know at the end that I cared the whole time. I cared a lot.
author: Metro Boomin

quote: It's not about, 'Oh, look at me like a star!' Look at me like I care.
author: Metro Boomin

quote: The amount of grind and effort I put in my 20s into the music, I'mma put into the business aspect through these 30s. I watched my music seeds grow from 20 to 30. I can watch the rest of these grow from 30 to 40.
author: Metro Boomin

quote: I can't really identify if I ever really felt that I made it. Because even though we got a good start, we came a long way... it's a way even longer to go.
author: Metro Boomin

quote: I just be rapping. Every day I discover something new about myself, and I just do it.
author: Playboi Carti

quote: Some people don't know how to be alone, but I love it.
author: Playboi Carti

quote: That's just part of creating something new. If this is something that people accept right away, how different is it?
author: Playboi Carti

quote: I've been like this my whole life. When I do speak, it's for a reason.
author: Playboi Carti

quote: Instruments last forever. When you listen to a computer sound, those become of a time.
author: Ty Dolla $ign

quote: When it comes to music, people have already played every single line — there's just different ways you can do it.
author: Ty Dolla $ign

quote: There's so many other artists out there, and now there's the internet and we can choose what we want, you don't have to be anything, you can just be yourself.
author: Ty Dolla $ign

quote: If I just made 'Monëy So Big' 50 times in a row, I would be going nowhere.
author: Yeat

quote: It could feel very personal, but then four bars later I'm shit talking. It's like your life, everything's back and forth.
author: Yeat

quote: If you sit there listening to other rappers all day, you start to sound like them, even subconsciously.
author: Yeat

quote: I believe that if I believe something, it will for sure happen. But you also can't fiend for anything.
author: Yeat

quote: It's time to give me my flowers. I don't want them when I ain't here.
author: Takeoff

quote: Kobe was in that gym when nobody was in that gym. You wasn't in that gym with me, and you wasn't in that basement with me, and we stayed cooking up that whole time, perfecting our craft and sharpening our tools.
author: Takeoff

quote: All this is just material. I could give everything up for my grandma. That was the backbone of the family.
author: Takeoff

quote: It's feeling confident I'm going to go up with the music, but I'm down every day. It's the challenge of trying to be the best at your worst times.
author: Offset

quote: I get through my day thinking it's fake.
author: Offset

quote: You gotta put your own identity on it.
author: Mike WiLL Made-It

quote: You got two different types of creatives. You got innovators and you got duplicators.
author: Mike WiLL Made-It

quote: Speak from your heart, speak from your soul. Express yourself.
author: Mike WiLL Made-It

quote: You can't create an AI me.
author: Mike WiLL Made-It

quote: We could either fall back and fade away or bring it to another level.
author: Statik Selektah

quote: I do a lot of things that I could do a different way and make a whole lot more money, but it doesn't feel right.
author: Statik Selektah

quote: I'm just holding that torch and keeping it going, keeping the fundamentals of hip-hop alive.
author: Statik Selektah

quote: Hip-Hop should be protected because it's not a novelty; it's a way of life.
author: Statik Selektah

quote: Education is everything for the next generation to understand what Hip-Hop actually is.
author: Statik Selektah

quote: I am very curious of the person who I shall become.
author: YoungBoy Never Broke Again

quote: I will not be provoked, I will not be broken, and I'm not going back.
author: YoungBoy Never Broke Again

quote: The lifestyle is just a big distraction from your real purpose.
author: YoungBoy Never Broke Again

quote: Nighttime, when everybody's asleep — it's the most peaceful time ever inside of life to me.
author: YoungBoy Never Broke Again

quote: I think about how many lives I actually am responsible for when it comes to my music.
author: YoungBoy Never Broke Again

quote: I wish I knew when I was younger how unhealthy this was for me. Whatever type of energy I had inside me, I would've pushed it toward something else.
author: YoungBoy Never Broke Again
